browserSearchPath: CLMS Bio-geophysical Parameters, Vegetation, Dry/Gross Dry Matter Productivity
collectionDescription: Provides information about the total organic matter produced by plant photosynthesis. It is expressed in kg of dry matter per hectare and per day. Every 10-days, estimates are available at global scale, at a spatial resolution of ~1km. More information here.

layers.longDescription: Gross Dry Matter Productivity represents the total organic matter produced by plant photosynthesis. It is expressed in kg of Dry Matter per hectare and per day (kg DM/ha/day).
